SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractClient
The AbstractClient contains all the methods necessary to set up the client side of a client-server architecture.
AbstractServer
The AbstractServer class maintains a thread that waits for connection attempts from clients.
ActionType
Enumeration defining the specific actions (commands) for client-server communication.
AdaptableClient
The AdaptableClient is a class that extends the AbstractClient in place of the ObservableClient .
AdaptableServer
The AdaptableServer is an adapter class that extends the AbstractServer class in place of the AbstractObservableServer .
Alarm
Utility class for handling UI alerts and notifications within the JavaFX application.
BarcodeScannerController
Controller for the Barcode Scanner simulation screen.
BaseController
Interface defining the base requirements for a GUI controller in this application.
BaseController
Interface for all controllers that need access to the main client UI and navigator.
BillController
Controller for the Bill Screen.
BusinessHourController
Controller class responsible for managing the restaurant's business/opening hours.
BusinessHourDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Business/Opening Hours.
ChatClient
ChatClient connects the client to the server.
CheckOutController
Controller for the Checkout Screen.
ClientUi
ClientUi manages the client-side user interface.
ConnectionToClient
An instance of this class is created by the server when a client connects.
Customer
Entity class representing a customer in the system.
CustomerController
Controller class responsible for managing Customer and Subscriber data.
CustomerDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Customer entities.
CustomerType
Enumeration representing the different types of customers in the system.
DBConnection
Singleton class responsible for managing the database connection pool.
EmailService
Service class responsible for handling all email communications using the SendGrid API.
Employee
Entity class representing an employee user in the system.
Employee.Role
 
EmployeeController
Controller class responsible for managing Employee-related operations.
EmployeeDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Employee data.
EmployeeLogic
Logic class for handling Employee-related requests.
ForgetCodeController
Controller for the "Forgot Confirmation Code" functionality.
GetTableController
Controller for retrieving a table using a confirmation code.
LoginController
Controller for the initial Login screen where the client connects to the server IP.
ManagerOptionsController
Controller for the Manager/Employee Dashboard.
ManagerReportsLogic
Logic class for handling Manager Reports.
MessageListener<T>
Interface for receiving messages from the server.
MonthlyReportsController
Controller for the Monthly Reports screen.
MonthlyReportService
Service responsible for generating statistical HTML reports.
MonthlyReportThread
Background thread for generating monthly reports automatically.
MyFile
Entity class representing a file to be transferred over the network.
MyFileController
Controller responsible for handling file download requests.
ObservableClient
This class acts as a subclass of AbstractClient and is also an Observable class.
ObservableOriginatorServer
The ObservableOriginatorServer is a subclass of ObservableServer that sends OriginatorMessage instances to its observers.
ObservableServer
This class acts as a subclass of AbstractServer and is also an Observable class.
OpeningHours
Entity class representing the opening hours of the restaurant.
Order
Entity class representing a restaurant order or reservation.
Order.OrderStatus
 
OrderCleanupThread
Background thread that runs periodically to maintain order integrity.
OrderController
Controller class responsible for managing the entire lifecycle of an Order.
OrderDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Order entities.
OrderLogic
Logic class for handling Order-related requests.
OrderUi_controller
Controller for the Order Management UI.
OriginatorMessage
A message class used by the Observable layer of the OCSF in order to conserve information about the originator of a message.
PaymentController
Controller for the Payment Screen.
QRcodeScanner
Utility class for generating and scanning QR codes.
RegisterEmployeeController
Controller for registering new employees.
RegisterSubscriberController
Controller for registering a new subscriber.
ReminderThread
Background thread for sending reminders to customers 2 hours before their reservation.
ReportController
Controller class responsible for handling report-related requests.
ReportDAO
 
ReportsController
Controller for the General Reports display.
Request
Represents a request sent between client and server.
ReservationController
Controller class for handling the Reservation screen.
ResourceType
Enum for the resources of the object that we are sending
Response
Represents a standardized network response sent from the server to the client.
Response.ResponseStatus
 
RestaurantLoginController
Controller for the Restaurant Employee Login screen.
Router
The Router class acts as a central dispatcher for incoming client requests.
ServerApp
Main entry point for the Server Application.
ServerController
The main controller for the server-side application.
ServerLoginController
Controller class for the Server Login/Configuration screen.
ServerViewController
Controller class for the Server GUI view.
ServerViewController.ClientRow
Inner class representing a row in the clients table.
SetEmployeePasswordController
Controller for setting a new password for an employee.
SubscriberHistoryController
Controller for viewing a subscriber's order history.
SubscriberHistoryController.OrderHistoryItem
Inner class representing a row in the history table.
SubscriberLoginController
Controller for the Subscriber Login screen.
SubscriberManagementController
Controller for managing subscribers.
SubscriberOptionController
Controller for the Subscriber Options menu.
Table
Entity class representing a physical table in the restaurant.
TableController
Controller class responsible for handling Table-related requests.
TableDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing restaurant tables.
TableLogic
Logic class for handling Table-related requests.
TableManagementController
Controller for managing restaurant tables.
TimeSlotStatus
Entity class representing the availability status of a specific time slot.
UpdateOrder
Controller for the "Update Order" window.
UpdateProfileController
Controller for the Update Profile screen.
UserLogic
Logic class for handling User-related requests (Subscribers/Customers).
WaitingList
Entity class representing an entry in the Waiting List.
WaitingListCheckThread
Background thread that periodically checks the Waiting List to see if any pending requests can be promoted to active orders based on table availability.
WaitingListController
Controller for the Waiting List UI.
WaitingListController
Controller class responsible for handling all Waiting List related operations.
WaitingListDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing the Waiting List in the database.
WaitingListLogic
Logic class for handling Waiting List requests.
